name: Apple Cake
description: A soft, moist cake that is a cross between a quick bread and a baked german apple pancake.
instructions: Line the bottom of a tube pan with parchment paper and grease with cooking spray.
Peel, core and chop apples into 0.75-inch chunks.
In a medium bowl, toss apples with cinnamon, sugar, and walnuts, then set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together oil, orange juice, sugar and vanilla.
Pour sugar mixture into flour mixture and whisk until just combined.
One at a time, add eggs to batter and whisk until egg is fully incorporated.
Pour half of batter evenly into prepared pan.
Carefully pour reserved apples and walnuts into pan on top of batter.
Pour remaining batter on top and level with a spatula.
Bake at 350°F until the top of the cake has browned and tester inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, about 1.5 hours.
Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack until completely cooled about 2 hours.
Invert cake onto a plate and remove from pan.
